# MuleSoft SAP S/4HANA OData Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.9) of SAP S/4HANA OData Connector documentation.
> See [SAP S/4HANA OData Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the SAP S/4HANA OData Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [SAP S/4HANA OData Connector 2.9](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector/latest/index.md)
- [SAP S/4HANA OData Connector 2.9 Batch Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector-create-batch.md)
- [SAP S/4HANA OData Connector 2.9 - Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector-examples.md)
- [SAP S/4HANA OData Connector 2.9 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure SAP S/4HANA OData Connector 2.9](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating SAP S/4HANA OData Connector to 2.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [SAP S/4HANA OData Connector 2.9 - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-cloud-connector-xml-maven.md)
